text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, my ears are greeted with<n>lively voices
in front of the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! The win should go to Ritto<n>Dorm,
obviously!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No way! Us Miho dormies literally<n>caught so
many of you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hoho? I spy a gathering of ponies!<n>What seems
to be the fuss?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There better not be any fightin' going<n>on...
without me, that is!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What took you so long? We were in<n>the middle of
a hardcore game of cops<n>and robbers—Ritto
versus Miho!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Cops and robbers, you say! That<n>game where
the cop team chases<n>after the robber team? Now,
that takes<n>me back!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: We can't decide who won.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So we need you two to settle the<n>score with a
one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Grah?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If it's a one-on-one battle you want,<n>then that's
what you'll get!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hoho, what an interesting proposal.<n>The two of
us, dueling it out... To arms,<n>Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Fuji, you'll be the robber! It's your<n>win if you
manage to escape!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
That means you're the cop,<n>Hishiama! Get her in
a bear hug and<n>arrest her!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Try and catch me, Hishiama! If those<n>hands of
yours can reach my<n>rocket-fast speed, that is!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hah, you'll be sorry! They don't call<n>me Queen
of the Amazons for nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, you slippery little weasel. I've<n>finally got
you cornered.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Give up, Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While this is unfortunate... it would be<n>an honor to
be captured by you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why are you smilin'?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki pulls Hishi Amazon in by<n>the waist
and gracefully embraces<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa, hey! What are you doin'?!<n>U-unhand me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I've come to steal you away.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Squeee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The roaring cheers on both sides are<n>enough to
bring the game to a close,<n>despite the lack of a
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Geez, don't you know not to mess<n>with me?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. When you're my opponent,<n>perhaps I
can't help but play around a<n>bit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You see, Hishiama... it's my hope to<n>entertain
everyone—as an entertainer<n>and as a dorm
leader.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Tch, show off.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her grouchy attitude, a faint<n>smirk
appears on Hishi Amazon's<n>face.
